body_excerpt: In futex_setup_timer and related functions of futex.c, there is a possible way to corrupt kernel memory due to a use after free. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In futex_setup_timer and related functions of futex.c, there is a possible way to corrupt kernel memory due to a use after free. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional exe
